PeerLink for Windows — Installation Instructions
  
SmartScreen Warning:
  Because PeerLink is not yet signed with a commercial certificate,
  Windows SmartScreen may show a warning on first run.
  Click "More info" then "Run anyway" to proceed.
  This is safe — PeerLink is open source at:
  https://github.com/souravvoid/filedrop
  
EXE Installer:
  1. Double-click PeerLink-1.0.0-Setup.exe
  2. Click through the install wizard
  3. PeerLink appears in Start Menu and optionally on Desktop
  
MSI Installer (silent enterprise deployment):
  msiexec /i PeerLink-1.0.0.msi /qn INSTALLDIR="C:\Program Files\PeerLink"
